headline: Ralph Lauren (RL) Valuation Check After Record US$8b Revenue And Earnings Beat
summary: Ralph Lauren (RL) is back in focus after reporting better than expected fourth quarter and full year results, crossing US$8b in annual revenue, boosting earnings and lifting guidance for revenue growth and margin expansion. See our latest analysis for Ralph Lauren. Ralph Lauren’s share price has reacted strongly to the earnings beat and dividend increase, with a 7 day share price return of 15.60%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 39.45% highlights sustained momentum despite a...

headline: RL Q1 Deep Dive: Diversified Growth and Brand Elevation Drive Outperformance
summary: Fashion brand Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 16.6% year on year to $1.98 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.80 per share was 10.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Ralph Lauren (RL) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of fashion brand Ralph Lauren (NYSE:RL) jumped 10.2% in the morning session after the company reported strong first-quarter 2026 results that beat Wall Street expectations.
